SEARCH

Uses of Class
cpdt.backend.twin.TwinDeviceState

Packages that use TwinDeviceState
Package
Description
cpdt.backend.controllers
Provides REST controllers for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.twin
Provides components for maintaining the Digital Twin state.

  • Uses of TwinDeviceState in cpdt.backend.controllers

    Methods in cpdt.backend.controllers that return types with arguments of type TwinDeviceState
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<TwinDeviceState>
    TwinController.getAreaState(ProcessArea processArea)
    Retrieves the current Digital Twin state for all devices within a specified process area.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TwinDeviceState>
    TwinController.getDeviceState(String deviceId)
    Retrieves the current Digital Twin state of a specific device.
    Collection<TwinDeviceState>
    TwinController.getTwin()
    Retrieves the current state of all devices maintained by the Digital Twin.

  • Uses of TwinDeviceState in cpdt.backend.twin

    Methods in cpdt.backend.twin that return types with arguments of type TwinDeviceState
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<TwinDeviceState>
    TwinStateStore.getAllStates()
    Retrieves the current state of all devices in the Digital Twin.
    Optional<TwinDeviceState>
    TwinStateStore.getState(String deviceId)
    Retrieves the current Digital Twin state of a specific device.
    List<TwinDeviceState>
    TwinStateStore.getStatesByProcessArea(ProcessArea processArea)
    Retrieves the current Digital Twin state of devices within a process area.
    Map<String,TwinDeviceState>
    TwinStateStore.getTwinStates()
    Retrieves an immutable view of all stored Digital Twin states.
